brand.name: Shanta
brand.promise: Send what matters through people you can trust.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.headline: Send what matters through people you can trust
landing.subhead: Shanta connects senders with trusted travelers who have spare luggage space — with verified handoffs and escrow built in.

auth.phoneSubtitle: Enter your phone number and we'll send you a verification code.
auth.errorInvalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number in international format.
auth.errorInvalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired. Please try again.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a while before trying again.

onboarding.title: How will you use Shanta?
onboarding.subtitle: You can do more than one — and change this later.
onboarding.senderDesc: I have something to send to another city.
onboarding.travelerDesc: I'm travelling and have spare luggage space.
onboarding.aggregatorDesc: I operate a drop-off / consolidation point.

dashboard.comingSoon: Your tools will appear here as we build out Phase 1.
dashboard.sendPackageDesc: Create a new shipment and drop it off at a hub.
dashboard.createTripDesc: Publish your trip and available luggage space.
dashboard.myTripsDesc: Manage your active trips and assignments.
dashboard.hubConsoleDesc: Manage incoming shipments at your hub.

shipments.title: My Shipments
shipments.createSubtitle: Fill in the details below. Your package will be verified at the hub before dispatch.
shipments.insuranceDesc: Adds a small premium but covers loss or damage.

trips.title: My Trips
trips.createSubtitle: Tell us about your trip and available capacity.

hub.title: Hub Console
hub.intakeSubtitle: Weigh the parcel, check for prohibited items, and take a photo.
hub.cashCheck: I confirm this package contains no undeclared cash
hub.verifySubtitle: Photograph the contents so the traveler can inspect them.
hub.sealSubtitle: Apply a tamper-evident seal and record its ID.

confirm.title: Confirm your delivery
confirm.subtitle: Your item has arrived. Please confirm you received it in good condition.
confirm.problemPlaceholder: Describe the issue (e.g. broken seal, missing item)
confirm.confirmedDesc: Thank you for confirming. Your feedback has been recorded.
confirm.disputedDesc: We've recorded your report. Our team will review the evidence and contact you.
confirm.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
confirm.alreadyConfirmed: This delivery has already been confirmed.

admin.title: Shanta Admin
admin.noAccess: You don't have access to the admin area.
